$comment: Free taster of Acne Decoded. Three short lessons that give the practitioner a clear taste of the clinical-reasoning approach taught in the paid course — without giving away the full pathway. Lesson 03 is the soft transition into the paid version.

parts.title: The taster
parts.body: What you'll get out of these three short lessons.

parts.title: The science under the skin
parts.body: A clear, science-led look at what acne actually is, and why most plans treat the symptom, not the driver.

parts.title: Where to go from here
parts.body: The full Acne Decoded course, and how it picks up where this one ends.
